fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 33-year-old White female with schizophrenia for routine visit.
fields.Subjective: Patient arrived appearing well-groomed and positive. Reports excellent adherence to aripiprazole 20 mg every morning using routine and husband's reminder. States feeling very well. No hallucinations for five months. No paranoid ideation. Sleep excellent at 8 hours nightly. Appetite good, weight stable at 142 lbs. Working full-time as elementary school teacher, loves working with second graders. Mood 'excellent' rated 8/10. Married for two years, happy relationship. Enjoys reading and book club participation. Attending therapy biweekly for wellness. Two years sober from alcohol. Pursuing master's degree online. Building successful career in education. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Dr. Steven Parker, MD, Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Professionally dressed, excellent grooming, bright affect

fields.Psychosocial_Context: Married; employed as elementary teacher; two years sober; pursuing master's; excellent functional recovery.
Assessment_and_Plan: Outstanding medication adherence and symptom control.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. Steven Parker, MD, Psychiatrist — Educators Mental Wellness, 4521 School Street, Minneapolis, MN 55455, Phone: (555) 772-4498, Fax: (555) 772-4499
